heading: Inventories
label: 5369 Inventories
text: Each proprietor of premises subject to the provisions of this subchapter shall take and report such inventories as the Secretary may by regulations prescribe.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 5369, , , consisted of provisions similar to those comprising this section, prior to the general revision of this chapter by .act Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 73668A Stat. 666Pub. L. 85–859
Amendments1976— struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 94–455
